name: Begin Wallet
description_short: Non-custodial Cardano wallet for browser and mobile.
description_long: Non-custodial Cardano wallet for browser and mobile with payment links, deep-link support, Begin ID usernames (ENS-style), and Ledger and Keystone hardware support.

products.name: Begin Wallet – Mobile
products.description: Non-custodial iOS and Android wallet for ADA and Cardano native assets.

products.name: Begin Wallet – Browser Extension
products.description: Chrome browser extension for connecting to Cardano dApps.
